news.t: ETF Prime: Defiance Launches First-Ever Autism ETF

overview.description: The Efficient Market Portfolio Plus ETF Trust Units (EMPB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests long and short in equity and US Treasury ETFs based on momentum signals. The fund seeks capital appreciation. EMPB was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by EA Series Trust.

data.title: ETF Prime: Defiance Launches First-Ever Autism ETF
data.text: The first-ever autism ETF and the continued rise of quantum computing were both in the spotlight on this week's ETF Prime. Host Nate Geraci welcomed Sylvia Jablonski, chief investment officer of Defia...
